punisher.name: The Punisher
punisher.bio: After his family was killed in a mob hit, Frank Castle dedicated his life's work to fighting crime in his own way: by becoming judge, jury, and executioner.

comics.title: The Punisher: Year One
comics.description: A vividly detailed comic series that depicts Frank Castle's origin story and how he became the Punisher!

comics.title: Punisher MAX
comics.description: A gritty and ruthless comic run set in an alternate universe where the Punisher is even more brutal as he faces a world without superhumans.

entertainment.title: Punisher: War Zone
entertainment.description: Often said to be the most comic accurate live action Punisher, the late Ray Stevenson's Frank Castle wages a war against the mafia.

entertainment.title: Daredevil (Season 2)
entertainment.description: Frank Castle's violent first appearance in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU).

entertainment.title: The Punisher
entertainment.description: Set after the events of Daredevil Season 2, Frank Castle seeks revenge on the people behind his family's murder.

entertainment.title: Daredevil: Born Again (Season 1)
entertainment.description: After crimelord Wilson Fisk (a.k.a. the Kingpin) became Mayor of New York City, the creation of his Anti-Vigilante Task Force forces Daredevil and the Punisher to team up against Fisk's reign of terror.

entertainment.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
entertainment.description: An hour-long TV special detailing Frank Castle's struggle with PTSD, when suddenly crime boss Ma Gnucci puts a bounty on his head, forcing the Punisher to spring back into action.

spiderman.name: Spider-Man
spiderman.bio: Bitten by a radioactive spider as a teenager, Peter Parker sees it as his responsibility to use his great powers to protect and help out every person he can.

comics.title: Amazing Fantasy #15
comics.description: The first ever appearance of the wallcrawler!

comics.title: Ultimate Spider-Man (2000) #1
comics.description: A reinterpretation of Spider-Man from the early 2000s. This comic run was used as inspiration for multiple live action movies!

entertainment.title: Spider-Man: The Animated Series
entertainment.description: A classic TV series beloved by fans of all ages. This show inspired many storylines in movies and video games, even today!

entertainment.title: The Spectacular Spider-Man
entertainment.description: Often said to be the best animated Spider-Man show, The Spectacular Spider-Man is a timeless classic with an iconic artstyle.

entertainment.title: Spider-Man (2002)
entertainment.description: The iconic and campy live action classic starring Tobey Maguire!
